summary: Frontend testing of the 3 new UI features (Visual DNA in Library, Marketing & Avaliação in Studio with Caption + Luxury Score tabs, MobileNav 7-tab horizontal scroll) plus first-visit onboarding. ALL 5 TESTS PASSED. AI integrations (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via /api/ai/visual-dna, /api/ai/generate-caption, /api/ai/luxury-score) return rich Portuguese content rendered correctly with all required sections and data-testids.

verified_behaviors.library_visual_dna_panel: PASS — data-testid='visual-dna-panel' renders when saved.length>0. Click on 'visual-dna-toggle' fires POST /api/ai/visual-dna; result returns within ~20s. The 'visual-dna-result' block shows ALL required sections: ASSINATURA (signature poetic prose), MOOD (5 chips: etéreo/romantic/minimalista/powder/atemporal), CORES DOMINANTES (4 swatches with hex labels), MÉDIAS DO SEU ACERVO (Luxo 63 / Contraste 27 / Harmonia 67 / Profundidade 70 / Sofisticação 96), ESTILOS RECORRENTES (floral · 1), PARA EVOLUIR (3 bullet recommendations), PRÓXIMA PALETA SUGERIDA (4 hex swatches with 'Usar no Studio' button).
verified_behaviors.studio_marketing_caption: PASS — data-testid='marketing-panel' renders below Studio grid. All 3 platform chips (instagram/tiktok/etsy) and 4 tone chips (luxuoso/poetico/divertido/minimalista) present and clickable. Selected TikTok platform, clicked 'GERAR LEGENDA' → 'caption-result' rendered with HEADLINE ('Pétalas que tocam sua pele'), LEGENDA (multi-line PT-BR copy), hashtags array, alt_text. Toast 'Legenda gerada!' appeared.
verified_behaviors.studio_marketing_luxury_score: PASS — Clicking 'marketing-tab-luxury' switches tab; 'compute-luxury-btn' fires POST /api/ai/luxury-score. 'luxury-result' renders with score=63, tier='PREMIUM', 4 metric bars (contrast/harmony/depth/sophistication), PARECER paragraph, and 3 SUGESTÕES bullets.
verified_behaviors.mobile_nav_horizontal_scroll: PASS — Viewport 390x844. data-testid='mobile-nav' present with all 7 items in DOM: home, studio, library, mixer, calculator, compare, tips. UL scrollWidth=627 > clientWidth=388 → horizontally scrollable. After scroll_into_view on 'mobile-nav-tips' (Técnicas), element visible at bbox x=216. Labels: Início, Studio, Salvos, Mixer, Proporções, A/B, Técnicas.
verified_behaviors.onboarding_first_visit: PASS — With localStorage.clear() and fresh load on '/', data-testid='onboarding-flow' modal renders and is visible. Persist-store bypass via 'lindart.onboarding.v1.completed'='1' works correctly (Studio reachable without modal interception in TEST 2).
verified_behaviors.onboarding_bypass_via_localstorage: PASS — Setting localStorage 'lindart.onboarding.v1.completed' = '1' before navigation successfully prevents the OnboardingFlow overlay from blocking Studio interactions. The iteration_10 click-interception regression appears resolved when this key is used.

observations_minor: Visual DNA panel header shows '1 paletas analisadas · luxo médio 63/100' even though localStorage was seeded with 2 palettes (TEST Aurora + TEST Rose). The AI response/aggregation only reflected the rose palette's colors and metrics. Could be a backend dedup, a hydration race (saved array snapshot at click time), or expected behavior — but worth a quick verification by main agent. Functionally non-blocking.
Three.js / R3F WebGL warnings in console ('THREE.Clock deprecated', 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels') from ResinVisualizer / Productions3D. Cosmetic; not user-facing.
Pluralization typo in DNA header: '1 paletas analisadas' should be '1 paleta analisada' (singular).
action_items: (LOW) Verify DNA aggregation includes all persisted palettes (Library currently appears to analyze only 1 of 2 seeded palettes).
(LOW/i18n) Fix singular/plural in Visual DNA subtitle: '{n} paleta(s) analisada(s)'.
critical_code_review_comments: VisualDNAPanel correctly normalizes color shapes via `typeof c === 'string' ? c : c.hex` before POSTing — matches the {hex,name,role} shape used in store. Good.
MarketingPanel does the same defensive normalization for both /api/ai/generate-caption and /api/ai/luxury-score. Good.
MobileNav uses overflow-x-auto with scrollbar hidden and shrink-0 on items + pr-24 to reserve space for the Emergent badge — clean implementation matching the requirement.
Studio.jsx renders <MarketingPanel palette={activePalette}/> below the grid — disabled state on buttons gracefully handled when palette has no colors.
Library.jsx only mounts VisualDNAPanel when saved.length>0, with handleUseNextPalette wiring to savePalette + setActivePalette + navigate('/studio') — UX flow is solid.
Onboarding overlay bypass key (`lindart.onboarding.v1.completed=1`) works as documented — no regression from iteration_10 detected when this localStorage key is set.
seed_data_creation: Seeded localStorage 'lindart-store-v1' with 2 TEST_ palettes (TEST Aurora, TEST Rose) using real shape {hex,name,role}, and 'lindart.onboarding.v1.completed'='1' to bypass onboarding modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new AI-powered UI features verified working end-to-end against the real backend (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key). data-testids confirmed: visual-dna-panel, visual-dna-toggle, visual-dna-result, visual-dna-dominant, dna-use-next-palette; marketing-panel, marketing-tab-caption, marketing-tab-luxury, caption-platform-{instagram,tiktok,etsy}, caption-tone-{luxuoso,poetico,divertido,minimalista}, caption-piece-input, generate-caption-btn, caption-result, caption-error, copy-caption-btn, copy-hashtags-btn, compute-luxury-btn, luxury-result, luxury-score-value, luxury-score-gauge, luxury-tier, luxury-metrics, luxury-error; mobile-nav and mobile-nav-{home,studio,library,mixer,calculator,compare,tips}. Onboarding overlay no longer blocks /studio when 'lindart.onboarding.v1.completed'='1' is set in localStorage. Only minor cosmetic issues noted: DNA panel appears to analyze only 1 of 2 seeded palettes (worth a quick check) and a PT-BR pluralization issue in DNA header.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no blocking issues found in this round.
